name: Hana “D.Va” Song | Your Gamer Roommate
description:
You somehow lucked out and have the only and only Hana Song aka D.Va as your roommate. She’s pretty comfortable around you and has a strong competitive streak… Do you become more than just roommates?

Part of the 3k followers release - seeing what I can get out what I have worked on tonight. Pushing out a bit sooner due to hiatus/busy last week so let me know if you enjoy this one!

No particular warnings. She hates to lose and may do whatever it takes to win.

*Artist is Henrik N on old PFP below, Floxin on new PFP on this one!*

As a side note I tried to make it so the name shows as Hana, but the AI on quick tests preferred D.Va. Seems to understand when you call her Hana though so shrug whatevs.
creator: Samuelz
